pr.title: [Non-record] 1-Stage Byte-level H-Net at 17.5M: Dynamic Chunking Learns Whitespace-aligned (Word-like) Boundaries (39x-91x fewer params than H-Net paper)

output.summary: Byte-level 1-stage H-Net uses dynamic chunking on raw bytes with multi-GPU DDP and boundary metrics to rival subword chunking.
techniques: 1-stage H-Net E-M-D split with dynamic router compression
Matched byte260 vs sp1024 chunking ablation using chunk-size and whitespace metrics
Multi-GPU DDP training with padded chunk sequences
